revision.comment: Text replacement - "Category:Pages with blank templates" to "Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}"
Bot: remove deleted category Blank templates
Bot: remove deleted category Erroneous transclusions of Talk header
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

Drop param 'archives' as alias of param 'noarchives'. This is a terrible alias name, and existed in only 2 pages: Talk:Jonestown and Talk:Antisemitic trope; no remaining examples per https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?search=Talk%3A+hastemplate%3ATalk_header+insource%3A%2F%5C%7B%5C%7Btalk+header%5B%5E%7D%5D%7B1%2C40%7D%5C%7C+*archives+*%3D%2F&title=Special%3ASearch&profile=default&fulltext=1 . If we want to keep it, then we need to test for archives=no, not for simple presence of the param.
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{bottom}}} | yes | {{Tmbox | small = {{{small|}}} | image = none | style = text-align: center | text = {{Strong|Please place new discussions at the bottom of the talk page.}} }} }}{{#if: 1{{#switch: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}} |1 |119=1 |}}{{#ifeq:{{{demospace|}}}|1|1}}{{#ifeq:{{{demospace|}}}|main|1}}| {{#ifeq: {{Yesno-no|{{{hide_find_sources|}}}}} | yes || }}}}{{#if: {{{noarchive|{{{noarchives|}}}}}} || {{#if:{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 |yes}}{{Yearly archive list|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}| }} }}{{#if: {{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive A | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive {{LASTYEAR}} | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive {{CURRENTYEAR}} | y}}{{{search|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{search|}}} | no || }} }}
{{#if: {{{custom_header|}}} | {{{custom_header}}} | {{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | User talk | This is {{Subpage other|a subpage of }}[[{{#titleparts: {{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}|1}}|{{#titleparts: {{PAGENAME}}|1}}]]'s [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|talk page]], where you can send {{Gender|{{#titleparts: {{PAGENAME}}|1}}|obj}} messages and comments.|This is the [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|talk page]] for discussing {{#if: {{{wp|{{{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia talk:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|#invoke:string2|void}}|startswith|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|WikiProject}}}}} | [[:{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}|{{PAGENAME}}]] and anything related to its purposes and tasks|improvements to the [[:{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}|{{#if: {{{display_title|}}} |{{{display_title}}} | {{PAGENAME}}}}]] {{Pagetype}}}}.
{{#if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} || This is [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#FORUM|not a forum]] for general discussion of the subject of the article.}}}}}}
* Put new text under old text. {{Strong|[[Special:NewSection/{{TALKPAGENAMEE}}|Click here to start a new topic.]]}} * New to Wikipedia? Welcome! [[Help:Introduction|Learn to edit]]; [[Wikipedia:Questions|get help]].
* [[Wikipedia:Assume good faith|Assume good faith]] * [[Wikipedia:Civility|Be polite]] and [[Wikipedia:No personal attacks|avoid personal attacks]] * [[Wikipedia:Please do not bite the newcomers|Be welcoming to newcomers]] * Seek [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution requests|dispute resolution]] if needed
{{#switch:yes|{{{arpol|}}}|{{#if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | no | yes}}=
'''Article policies''' * [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|Neutral point of view]] * [[Wikipedia:No original research|No original research]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|Verifiability]]
}}{{#if: {{{1|}}}{{{shortcut|}}}{{{shortcut1|}}}{{{sc|}}}{{{sc1|}}} |
{{Shortcut|{{{1|{{{shortcut|{{{shortcut1|{{{sc|{{{sc1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{shortcut2|{{{sc2|}}}}}}}}}|{{{3|{{{shortcut3|{{{sc3|}}}}}}}}}|{{{4|{{{shortcut4|{{{sc4|}}}}}}}}}|{{{5|{{{shortcut5|{{{sc5|}}}}}}}}} }}
}}
{{Find sources|{{{search_term|{{{search_term1|}}}}}}|{{{search_term2|}}}|{{{search_term3|}}}|{{{search_term4|}}}|domain={{{domain|{{{search-domain|}}}}}}}}
'''[[Help: Archiving a talk page|Archives]]'''{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive index | ([[ {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive index|index]])}}{{#ifexist: User:ClueBot III/Master Detailed Indices/{{FULLPAGENAME}} | ([[User:ClueBot III/Master Detailed Indices/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|index]])}}: {{Comma separated entries|{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive A | {{Archive list alpha|nobr=yes|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|}}|{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 |{{Archive list|nobr=yes|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{Yearly archive list|noredir=yes|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}{{#if:{{Th/abp|age}}|{{Tooltip|Auto-archiving period|Topics with timestams are automatically archived by {{#if: {{Th/abp|bot}} | {{Th/abp|bot}} | a bot}} after {{Th/abp|age}} {{Th/abp|units}} of inactivity{{#if: {{Th/abp|min}} | when more than {{Th/abp|min}} threads are present}}.}}: '''{{human readable duration|{{Th/abp|age}}|{{Th/abp|units}}}}''' [[File:Information icon4.svg|16px|link=Help:Archiving a talk page#Automated archiving|alt=]]}}
{{Search box|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}|search-break=no|search-width=auto|search-button-label=Search archives}}
{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[Category:Pages using Talk header with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]|preview=Page using [[Template:Talk header]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | | arpol | bottom | custom_header | domain | demospace | disclaimer | display_title | hide_find_sources | noarchive | noarchives | sc | sc1 | sc2 | sc3 | sc4 | sc5 | search | search-domain | search_term | search_term1 | search_term2 | search_term3 | search_term4 | shortcut | shortcut1 | shortcut2 | shortcut3 | shortcut4 | shortcut5 | small | wp }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{bottom}}} | yes | {{Tmbox | small = {{{small|}}} | image = none | style = text-align: center | text = {{Strong|Please place new discussions at the bottom of the talk page.}} }} }}{{#if: 1{{#switch: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}} |1 |119=1 |}}{{#ifeq:{{{demospace|}}}|1|1}}{{#ifeq:{{{demospace|}}}|main|1}}| {{#ifeq: {{Yesno-no|{{{hide_find_sources|}}}}} | yes || }}}}{{#if: {{{noarchive|{{{noarchives|}}}}}} || {{#if:{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 |yes}}{{Yearly archive list|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}| }} }}{{#if: {{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive A | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive {{LASTYEAR}} | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive {{CURRENTYEAR}} | y}}{{{search|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{search|}}} | no || }} }}
{{#if: {{{custom_header|}}} | {{{custom_header}}} | {{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | User talk | This is {{Subpage other|a subpage of }}[[{{#titleparts: {{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}|1}}|{{#titleparts: {{PAGENAME}}|1}}]]'s [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|talk page]], where you can send {{Gender|{{#titleparts: {{PAGENAME}}|1}}|obj}} messages and comments.|This is the [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|talk page]] for discussing {{#if: {{{wp|{{{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia talk:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|#invoke:string2|void}}|startswith|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|WikiProject}}}}} | [[:{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}|{{PAGENAME}}]] and anything related to its purposes and tasks|improvements to the [[:{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}|{{#if: {{{display_title|}}} |{{{display_title}}} | {{PAGENAME}}}}]] {{Pagetype}}}}.
{{#if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} || This is [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#FORUM|not a forum]] for general discussion of the subject of the article.}}}}}}
* Put new text under old text. {{Strong|[[Special:NewSection/{{TALKPAGENAMEE}}|Click here to start a new topic.]]}} * New to Wikipedia? Welcome! [[Help:Introduction|Learn to edit]]; [[Wikipedia:Questions|get help]].
* [[Wikipedia:Assume good faith|Assume good faith]] * [[Wikipedia:Civility|Be polite]] and [[Wikipedia:No personal attacks|avoid personal attacks]] * [[Wikipedia:Please do not bite the newcomers|Be welcoming to newcomers]] * Seek [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution requests|dispute resolution]] if needed
{{#switch:yes|{{{arpol|}}}|{{#if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | no | yes}}=
'''Article policies''' * [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|Neutral point of view]] * [[Wikipedia:No original research|No original research]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|Verifiability]]
}}{{#if: {{{1|}}}{{{shortcut|}}}{{{shortcut1|}}}{{{sc|}}}{{{sc1|}}} |
{{Shortcut|{{{1|{{{shortcut|{{{shortcut1|{{{sc|{{{sc1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{shortcut2|{{{sc2|}}}}}}}}}|{{{3|{{{shortcut3|{{{sc3|}}}}}}}}}|{{{4|{{{shortcut4|{{{sc4|}}}}}}}}}|{{{5|{{{shortcut5|{{{sc5|}}}}}}}}} }}
}}
{{Find sources|{{{search_term|{{{search_term1|}}}}}}|{{{search_term2|}}}|{{{search_term3|}}}|{{{search_term4|}}}|domain={{{domain|{{{search-domain|}}}}}}}}
'''[[Help: Archiving a talk page|Archives]]'''{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive index | ([[ {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive index|index]])}}{{#ifexist: User:ClueBot III/Master Detailed Indices/{{FULLPAGENAME}} | ([[User:ClueBot III/Master Detailed Indices/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|index]])}}: {{Comma separated entries|{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive A | {{Archive list alpha|nobr=yes|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|}}|{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 |{{Archive list|nobr=yes|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{Yearly archive list|noredir=yes|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}{{#if:{{Th/abp|age}}|{{Tooltip|Auto-archiving period|Topics with timestams are automatically archived by {{#if: {{Th/abp|bot}} | {{Th/abp|bot}} | a bot}} after {{Th/abp|age}} {{Th/abp|units}} of inactivity{{#if: {{Th/abp|min}} | when more than {{Th/abp|min}} threads are present}}.}}: '''{{human readable duration|{{Th/abp|age}}|{{Th/abp|units}}}}''' [[File:Information icon4.svg|16px|link=Help:Archiving a talk page#Automated archiving|alt=]]}}
{{Search box|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}|search-break=no|search-width=auto|search-button-label=Search archives}}
{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[Category:Pages using Talk header with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]|preview=Page using [[Template:Talk header]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | | arpol | bottom | custom_header | domain | demospace | disclaimer | display_title | hide_find_sources | noarchive | noarchives | sc | sc1 | sc2 | sc3 | sc4 | sc5 | search | search-domain | search_term | search_term1 | search_term2 | search_term3 | search_term4 | shortcut | shortcut1 | shortcut2 | shortcut3 | shortcut4 | shortcut5 | small | wp }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Talk header]] to [[Template:Talk page header]]: I guess I am immediately moving more things than I thought with this template. But hope this goes well. My bot uses a different named header template so we are using it
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{bottom}}} | yes | {{Tmbox | small = {{{small|}}} | image = none | style = text-align: center | text = {{Strong|Please place new discussions at the bottom of the talk page.}} }} }}{{#if: 1{{#switch: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}} |1 |119=1 |}}{{#ifeq:{{{demospace|}}}|1|1}}{{#ifeq:{{{demospace|}}}|main|1}}| {{#ifeq: {{Yesno-no|{{{hide_find_sources|}}}}} | yes || }}}}{{#if: {{{noarchive|{{{noarchives|}}}}}} || {{#if:{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 |yes}}{{Yearly archive list|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}| }} }}{{#if: {{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive A | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive {{LASTYEAR}} | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive {{CURRENTYEAR}} | y}}{{{search|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{search|}}} | no || }} }}

* [[Wikipedia:Assume good faith|Assume good faith]] * [[Wikipedia:Civility|Be polite]] and [[Wikipedia:No personal attacks|avoid personal attacks]] * [[Wikipedia:Please do not bite the newcomers|Be welcoming to newcomers]] * Seek [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution requests|dispute resolution]] if needed

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{bottom}}} | yes | {{Tmbox | small = {{{small|}}} | image = none | style = text-align: center | text = {{Strong|Please place new discussions at the bottom of the talk page.}} }} }}{{#if: 1{{#switch: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}} |1 |119=1 |}}{{#ifeq:{{{demospace|}}}|1|1}}{{#ifeq:{{{demospace|}}}|main|1}}| {{#ifeq: {{Yesno-no|{{{hide_find_sources|}}}}} | yes || }}}}{{#if: {{{noarchive|{{{noarchives|}}}}}} || {{#if:{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 |yes}}{{Yearly archive list|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}| }} }}{{#if: {{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive A | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive {{LASTYEAR}} | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive {{CURRENTYEAR}} | y}}{{{search|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{search|}}} | no || }} }}

'''[[Help: Archiving a talk page|Archives]]'''{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive index | ([[ {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive index|index]])}}{{#ifexist: User:ClueBot III/Master Detailed Indices/{{FULLPAGENAME}} | ([[User:ClueBot III/Master Detailed Indices/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|index]])}}: {{Comma separated entries|{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive A | {{Archive list alpha|nobr=yes|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|}}|{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 |{{Archive list|nobr=yes|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{Yearly archive list|noredir=yes|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}{{#if:{{Th/abp|age}}|{{Tooltip|Auto-archiving period|Topics with timestams are automatically archived by {{#if: {{Th/abp|bot}} | {{Th/abp|bot}} | a bot}} after {{Th/abp|age}} {{Th/abp|units}} of inactivity{{#if: {{Th/abp|min}} | when more than {{Th/abp|min}} threads are present}}.}}: '''{{human readable duration|{{Th/abp|age}}|{{Th/abp|units}}}}''' [[File:Information icon4.svg|16px|link=Help:Archiving a talk page#Automated archiving|alt=]]}}
{{Search box|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}|search-break=no|search-width=auto|search-button-label=Search archives}}
{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=|preview=Page using [[Template:Talk header]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | | arpol | bottom | custom_header | domain | demospace | disclaimer | display_title | hide_find_sources | noarchive | noarchives | sc | sc1 | sc2 | sc3 | sc4 | sc5 | search | search-domain | search_term | search_term1 | search_term2 | search_term3 | search_term4 | shortcut | shortcut1 | shortcut2 | shortcut3 | shortcut4 | shortcut5 | small | wp }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Pages using Talk header with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{bottom}}} | yes | {{Tmbox | small = {{{small|}}} | image = none | style = text-align: center | text = {{Strong|Please place new discussions at the bottom of the talk page.}} }} }}{{#if: 1{{#switch: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}} |1 |119=1 |}}{{#ifeq:{{{demospace|}}}|1|1}}{{#ifeq:{{{demospace|}}}|main|1}}| {{#ifeq: {{Yesno-no|{{{hide_find_sources|}}}}} | yes || }}}}{{#if: {{{noarchive|{{{noarchives|}}}}}} || {{#if:{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 |yes}}{{Yearly archive list|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}| }} }}{{#if: {{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive A | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive {{LASTYEAR}} | y}}{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive {{CURRENTYEAR}} | y}}{{{search|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{search|}}} | no || }} }}
{{#if: {{{custom_header|}}} | {{{custom_header}}} | {{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | User talk | This is {{Subpage other|a subpage of }}[[{{#titleparts: {{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}|1}}|{{#titleparts: {{PAGENAME}}|1}}]]'s [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|talk page]], where you can send {{Gender|{{#titleparts: {{PAGENAME}}|1}}|obj}} messages and comments.|This is the [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|talk page]] for discussing {{#if: {{{wp|{{{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia talk:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|#invoke:string2|void}}|startswith|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|WikiProject}}}}} | [[:{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}|{{PAGENAME}}]] and anything related to its purposes and tasks|improvements to the [[:{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}|{{#if: {{{display_title|}}} |{{{display_title}}} | {{PAGENAME}}}}]] {{Pagetype}}}}.
{{#if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} || This is [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#FORUM|not a forum]] for general discussion of the subject of the article.}}}}}}
* Put new text under old text. {{Strong|[[Special:NewSection/{{TALKPAGENAMEE}}|Click here to start a new topic.]]}} * New to Wikipedia? Welcome! [[Help:Introduction|Learn to edit]]; [[Wikipedia:Questions|get help]].
* [[Wikipedia:Assume good faith|Assume good faith]] * [[Wikipedia:Civility|Be polite]] and [[Wikipedia:No personal attacks|avoid personal attacks]] * [[Wikipedia:Please do not bite the newcomers|Be welcoming to newcomers]] * Seek [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution requests|dispute resolution]] if needed
{{#switch:yes|{{{arpol|}}}|{{#if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | no | yes}}=
'''Article policies''' * [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|Neutral point of view]] * [[Wikipedia:No original research|No original research]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|Verifiability]]
}}{{#if: {{{1|}}}{{{shortcut|}}}{{{shortcut1|}}}{{{sc|}}}{{{sc1|}}} |
{{Shortcut|{{{1|{{{shortcut|{{{shortcut1|{{{sc|{{{sc1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{shortcut2|{{{sc2|}}}}}}}}}|{{{3|{{{shortcut3|{{{sc3|}}}}}}}}}|{{{4|{{{shortcut4|{{{sc4|}}}}}}}}}|{{{5|{{{shortcut5|{{{sc5|}}}}}}}}} }}
}}
{{Find sources|{{{search_term|{{{search_term1|}}}}}}|{{{search_term2|}}}|{{{search_term3|}}}|{{{search_term4|}}}|domain={{{domain|{{{search-domain|}}}}}}}}
'''[[Help: Archiving a talk page|Archives]]'''{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive index | ([[ {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive index|index]])}}{{#ifexist: User:ClueBot III/Master Detailed Indices/{{FULLPAGENAME}} | ([[User:ClueBot III/Master Detailed Indices/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|index]])}}: {{Comma separated entries|{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive A | {{Archive list alpha|nobr=yes|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|}}|{{#ifexist: {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Archive 1 |{{Archive list|nobr=yes|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{Yearly archive list|noredir=yes|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}{{#if:{{Th/abp|age}}|{{Tooltip|Auto-archiving period|Topics with timestams are automatically archived by {{#if: {{Th/abp|bot}} | {{Th/abp|bot}} | a bot}} after {{Th/abp|age}} {{Th/abp|units}} of inactivity{{#if: {{Th/abp|min}} | when more than {{Th/abp|min}} threads are present}}.}}: '''{{human readable duration|{{Th/abp|age}}|{{Th/abp|units}}}}''' [[File:Information icon4.svg|16px|link=Help:Archiving a talk page#Automated archiving|alt=]]}}
{{Search box|root={{FULLPAGENAME}}|search-break=no|search-width=auto|search-button-label=Search archives}}
{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=|preview=Page using [[Template:Talk header]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | | arpol | bottom | custom_header | domain | demospace | disclaimer | display_title | hide_find_sources | noarchive | noarchives | sc | sc1 | sc2 | sc3 | sc4 | sc5 | search | search-domain | search_term | search_term1 | search_term2 | search_term3 | search_term4 | shortcut | shortcut1 | shortcut2 | shortcut3 | shortcut4 | shortcut5 | small | wp }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Pages using Talk header with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
